meta.title: S4x19 Dale Peterson Mini Keynote - Create The Future
meta.description:
Dale opens up S4x19 with three friends, Patrick Miller, Eireann Leverett, and Rob Lee asking What If questions. We are making progress in security ICS while at the same time falling behind to a variety of factors accelerating faster than the communities' progress.

Working harder on "Cyber Hygiene" isn't going to get it done. We need different answers and approaches, radically different. And to get those we need to ask better questions. The 532 S4 attendees are a large part of the people who will Create The Future of ICS and OT Security.
